description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a dark metallic finish, featuring a large display and a thin bezel. The front view shows a high-resolution screen displaying a macOS desktop with a Yosemite National Park wallpaper, and a black keyboard with a spacious trackpad below. The side views reveal the device's slim profile and the hinge connecting the screen to the base. The back view displays a prominent, glossy black Apple logo centered on the lid. The laptop's chassis appears to be made of aluminum, giving it a premium and sturdy look. The keyboard is backlit, and the overall design is minimalist, with no visible stickers or extraneous markings.
description: A slim, dark metallic laptop with a large display, black keyboard, and a prominent Apple logo on the back. The design is minimalist and premium, with a macOS desktop visible on the screen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with macOS desktop, black keyboard, and large trackpad.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's thin profile and hinge design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed lid with a centered, glossy black Apple logo.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim profile and keyboard edge.
attribute_brand_logo: A glossy black Apple logo is centered on the back of the laptop lid, shaped as a stylized apple with a bite taken out of the right side.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a macOS desktop with a Yosemite National Park wallpaper.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad, featuring black keys and white lettering.
